positive: A minimalist, stylized mountain range landscape viewed during a dramatic sunrise. The mountains are rendered with thick, deep indigo and sapphire blue silhouettes against a gradient sky of warm peach, vibrant orange, and pale gold. A single, stylized crescent moon is positioned near the peak. The composition must be highly central and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating pattern on apparel. Use a flat vector illustration style with high contrast and clean, solid color blocking. Cinematic lighting, clean edges, graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blur, realistic photography, text, watermark, low quality, fuzzy, messy, artifacts, gradient noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs
